description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstracted representation of an adult pedestrian, with exaggerated and elongated limbs and body parts. The head is somewhat realistic, featuring facial features and long, straight hair, but the rest of the body is stretched and merged into angular, glossy black forms that resemble shards or fragments. The arms are unnaturally extended, with one arm reaching far forward and the other trailing behind, both blending into the surrounding black material. The legs are similarly elongated and bent at sharp angles, with feet that are barely distinguishable from the rest of the structure. The overall form is highly stylized and surreal, lacking clear anatomical proportions and blending organic and geometric elements. The surface is predominantly glossy and reflective, giving the object a sleek, almost metallic appearance.
description: A surreal, distorted adult pedestrian figure with a realistic head and elongated, angular black limbs and body, featuring a glossy, reflective surface.
description_view_0: The head and upper body are visible, with the left arm stretched forward and the body merging into sharp, black angular forms.
description_view_1: The head is seen in profile, with the elongated arm extending forward and the glossy black material dominating the view.
description_view_2: The right side of the figure is shown, highlighting the extended arm and the abstract, angular lower body and legs.
description_view_3: The back and lower portion of the figure are visible, with the angular black forms and one foot protruding from the structure.
attribute_posture: highly distorted, stretched and abstracted pose
